todos: Drive the claude -p proposer/critic (affect_pr_loop) for a real autonomous run.
Persist the kept change into affect_spec.py via the PR loop's merge step.
Expand the candidate generator beyond the fixed honest set.
config_note: QUICK config (2 seeds x 60 turns). The canonical 300-turn x 8-seed frozen sweep and even a reduced 4x120 run OOM the XLA JIT in this container (the gamma anneal recompiles per turn). This is a REAL run of the generate->score->critic->keep loop over the frozen scorer at a small seed/turn budget; rerun without --quick on a host with more memory for the full-config verdict.
